title: Stuicer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Stuicer''' was a fruit that grew on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. It was bulblike, and its juice was sipped through a thin tube near the top.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
